meta.narrative: S/4HANA Upgrade 2025: Quality Successfully Upgraded. Team starting initial transaction validations before UAT Kickoff on 07/08 with Business, UAT Kickoff was already scheduled - Joule Activation: Call scheduled with SAP technical team on 07/08. - Fiori Business Roles Assignment: Finalized <2025 revision. Adding 2025 this week.

milestones.name: SSO – Dev
milestones.comment: End date updated from 2/7 to 2/20 based on adjusted timeline.

milestones.name: SSO – Quality
milestones.comment: User acceptance testing and resolve C: drive issue.

milestones.name: SSO – Production
milestones.comment: Moved to April 3rd to avoid go-live during month-end close activities.

milestones.name: SSO – Hyper Care VPN Issue
milestones.comment: Case 735274 was created for SAP SNC team.

workstreams.name: S/4HANA Upgrade 2025
workstreams.summary:
- QS100 Upgrade completed.
- Kickoff UAT next week.

milestones.name: Sandbox Copy
milestones.comment: Actual completion ran to Wednesday.

milestones.name: Sandbox – Set up Release Upgrade Mgmt Tool
milestones.comment: Setup completed and being reviewed by SAP.

milestones.name: Sandbox – Apply Required Notes
milestones.comment: Completed.

milestones.name: Sandbox – Run Maintenance Planner
milestones.comment: Completed. Only Divestiture workplaces flagged as a warning (expected).

milestones.name: Sandbox – Validate GUI & Fiori Compatibility
milestones.comment: Completed.

milestones.name: Sandbox – Custom Code Remediation
milestones.comment: Completed. ATC ran and validated.

milestones.name: Sandbox – Run SI Simplification Check
milestones.comment: Completed.

milestones.name: Sandbox – Service Request SUM to SAP
milestones.comment: Created and working with SAP directly. Upgrade scheduled for May 11th.

milestones.name: Sandbox – Regression Testing
milestones.comment: 233 transactions tested. Re running month end close transactions after remediation.

milestones.name: Dev Upgrade Preparations
milestones.comment: Simplification Items, Notes, SNP Glue

milestones.name: Development – Service Request SUM to SAP
milestones.comment: SAP starting process. We expect 3 stops, one for Divestiture Workplace remediation, one for SPAU objects remediation, one for scheduled job.

milestones.name: Quality - Service Request SUM to SAP
Prod - Service Request SUM to SAP

workstreams.name: Joule Activation
workstreams.summary: Kickoff with Joule Readiness Technical Team. Meeting confirmed for next week 07/08. Engagement for next 4 weeks.

milestones.name: Joule Activation in Dev
milestones.comment: Creating Services Request to SAP.

milestones.comment: Provide to Michael B / Michael M this week.

workstreams.name: Fiori Apps Activation
workstreams.summary: Sending new catalogs to SAP Security team to activate by 07/17.

workstreams.summary: Start Training schedule to review with Josh/Brian/Michael.
